summary: Iteration 21 - P1 Features Full Production Audit PASSED. All 20 backend tests passed. All CLIENT and ENTERPRISE endpoints verified with REAL production data (no mocks). Wishlist heart button on ServiceProductCard and ServiceProductDetailPage working. Add Provider button on EnterprisePage working. Enterprise services/orders routes working. IA campaigns use real DB targeting.
seed_data_creation: TEST_P1_Campaign created during IA campaign testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified working: 1) Wishlist heart button on ServiceProductCard.js and ServiceProductDetailPage.js - adds/removes items from wishlist with toast notifications, 2) Add Provider button (UserPlus icon) on EnterprisePage.js - adds/removes enterprise from personal providers with toast notifications, 3) Enterprise services/orders routes return real data with stats, 4) IA campaigns use real DB queries for targeting_details, 5) All Stripe checkouts return real checkout.stripe.com URLs

wishlist.UI_ServiceProductCard: PASS - heart button visible and functional

providers.POST /api/client/providers: PASS - adds enterprise to personal providers
providers.UI_EnterprisePage: PASS - UserPlus button visible and functional

premium.UI_PremiumPage: PASS - shows 3 plans with correct pricing

orders.GET /api/enterprise/orders: PASS - returns {orders: [...], stats: {total, pending, completed, total_revenue}}

ia_campaigns.POST /api/enterprise/ia-campaigns: PASS - returns targeting_details with real DB data

ui_verification.homepage: PASS - loads correctly with service cards showing wishlist buttons
ui_verification.services_page: PASS - 20 cards with wishlist buttons visible
ui_verification.enterprise_page: PASS - Add Provider button (UserPlus) visible and functional
ui_verification.service_detail_page: PASS - Wishlist button toggles between 'Favoris' and 'Dans les favoris'
ui_verification.client_dashboard: PASS - Shows cashback balance, orders, premium promotion
ui_verification.client_providers_page: PASS - Shows empty state with 'Découvrir nos prestataires' button
ui_verification.enterprise_dashboard: PASS - Shows views, orders, revenue, rating stats
